description: Main dashboard showing security panel status, partition controls, and activity feed

cookieDismissButton.context: Dismisses cookie popup if visible after login

doneButton.context: Closes the Security Notifications popup that appears after first login

selectAllCheckbox.context: Selects/deselects all security partitions. Text toggles between SELECT ALL and DESELECT ALL. After clicking, arming buttons appear. MUST add waitForTimeout(1000) after click for buttons to render.

armHomeButton.context: Arms perimeter sensors. IMPORTANT: (1) aria-label overrides accessible name so getByRole FAILS. (2) getByText matches multiple elements (per-partition buttons). MUST USE page.locator('button', { hasText: 'ARM HOME' }).first()

armAwayButton.context: Arms all sensors. Same issue as armHomeButton - use locator with hasText + first() to avoid strict mode violations.

disarmButton.context: Disarms selected partitions. Same pattern - use locator with hasText + first(). Appears after SELECT ALL when partitions are armed.

partitionStatusText.context: Shows current arming status of partitions. Values: 'Armed Home', 'Armed Away', 'Disarmed'

partitionSummaryText.context: Shows partition count summary like '2 of 2 Partitions Disarmed'

todaysActivitiesHeading.context: Section heading for the activity feed on home page

viewAllActivitiesButton.context: Link to full activity log from home page

afterSelectAll.description: Arming buttons become visible (Arm Home All, Arm Away All)

afterArmHome.description: Partition status changes to 'Armed Home'. Disarm button becomes available on next SELECT ALL

afterArmAway.description: Partition status changes to 'Armed Away'. Disarm button becomes available on next SELECT ALL
